title: Chapter 69
content:
Chapter 69: Risky

"Sophia, you have to tell me the truth. What’s going on? Are you sure you’re okay?" Maria called out, her voice filled with worry as she inspected Sophia.

’Why is she shaking so much...is it a fever? If it is, then why is she does she refuse to follow me and lay down? Something isn’t right.’

However, everything that happened to Sophia was completely involuntarily. She stood there, trembling without an answer for Maria.

There was no weakness in Denzel’s movements, and she could feel his tongue lashing drawing her closer to her climax, in just a few moments after her last release.

As a result, her body continued trembling even while Maria was standing right in front of her.

’Oh my god, oh my god, oh my god, oh my god....Denzel you’re gonna make me cum again...this is so wrong, but please don’t stoppppp.’ She cried out to herself.

Still, Sophia tried her best to maintain a composed expression.

"It’s nothing...I-I’m serious. I just have a cold maybe. It’s nothing at all. I promise you."

Maria stared at her. Clearly, she wasn’t a fool. She could already tell that Sophia was still lying to her.

"First it was just rats, now it’s a cold? Which isn’t Sophia?’

As she muttered this, she thought to herself.

’If she doesn’t want to tell me, then I can’t force it out of her. Pressing the issue might only lead to an argument, and there’s no reason to make things worse... but she’s my daughter, I shouldn’t leave her, she might be suffering.’

She groaned softly, shaking her head slightly.

’But...if Denzel really was out chasing some rat, and he comes back and sees me scolding Sophia, he might lose the mood I luckily met him in this morning...urr!...dang it...’

With that, Maria finally nodded, forcing herself to believe Sophia’s lie, even if momentarily.

"Well, if you say you’re okay, then I guess I’ll have to take your word for it."

Sophia forced a smile, doing her absolute best impression of an innocent daughter.

"Thank you, Mom."

Even as she smiled, she was struggling to keep herself composed.

Meanwhile, Denzel was growing irritated.

’Sophia had somehow managed to suppress every sound....that’s preposterous!’

To him, that felt like a personal challenge.

’She can’t be Serious? She’s trying to say I can’t even make her react? She can just hold everything in? Fuck this bitch, I’m way to sweet for you to contain.’

Determined, he continued his tongue lashing, if anything he enhanced his frequent rhythmic licks of her pussy, eating her off without consent.

’You keep trying to hold it all in, and your brother might just rape you right now Sophia...’

Sophia’s body trembles escalated drastically, almost as though she was in the presence of an earthquake.

’oh...my....aah~....Denzieee....!’

At that moment, Maria had already began proceeding away as she stepped towards the stove where Denzel’s food was warming.

On reaching it, she suddenly paused.

"Wait a minute..."

She frowned once more as she returned a glimpse to Sophia who immediately straightened her heavily shaking body, her breasts just a few ripples away of spilling from her dress.

"You said Denzel went after the rat, right? Then wait... if he’s outside, then why is he still chasing after them, he isn’t some kinda cat, so...why?"

Sophia’s eyes widened.

She had thought the conversation was already over, and with this, she was completely dumbfounded on what to reply.

"I... I..."

The words refused to come out.

Her thoughts scattered.

"Where is he, Sophia?"

Right then, Sophia instantly lost her train of thought.

"Ah—!"

A loud scream escaped her before she could stop it.

Sophia’s climax hit her harder than a truck-kun ever could. Her waterfall of love juices spraying all over her laps, feet and the floor as Denzel pulled out, using his finger to complete her Cummings trance.

Her body shook violently, and her knees nearly gave out beneath her.

She stumbled, barely keeping herself upright.

Meanwhile, Denzel remained silent.

"Good. Very good...cum for me you bitch...cum all over your body, just like thattt." From below her dress, he could visibly see her tits trembling violently, having a front row sit to the collision of tits.

"Sophia!" Maria cried.

She immediately rushed over and grabbed Sophia before she could fall.

Sophia’s breathing was heavy as she leaned against the counter for support.

Maria quickly brushed a hand across Sophia’s forehead.

"Are you peeing? Your body’s on fire. You need to sit down. I think you might have a fever."

She looked genuinely concerned.

"Oh my. Just wait here for a moment."

Maria hurried away.

She rushed down the corridor, grabbed a bucket of water and a towel, then quickly turned to return.

However, the moment she entered the kitchen again, she froze.

Denzel was now standing by the stove, calmly checking the food that had been warming.

Meanwhile, Sophia was bent over slightly, leaning against the counter and taking heavy breaths. Her cheeks were bright red.

Maria blinked in confusion.

Sophia already looked far better than she had only moments ago.

"Sophia?"

Maria hurried over and placed a hand against her neck.

"How are you feeling?"

Sophia blinked a few times before forcing a smile.

"I told you, Mom. I’m fine. It’s nothing at all. Nothing serious, really."

Maria frowned.

She touched Sophia’s neck again.

The heat was already fading.

It was almost as if the burning temperature she had felt earlier had suddenly disappeared.

Then another thought crossed her mind.

’Wait, when did Denzel get here?’

Her eyes shifted toward him.

Denzel turned away from the stove and looked back at them.

"Is something wrong?"

His voice sounded completely innocent, as though he had absolutely nothing to do with everything that had just happened.

However, as he remained, all so confidently, his thoughts were entirely different.

’She came really hard, but she’s doing her best to cover it up...nasty bitch is ruining my threesome plans again...’

He thought about it for a moment before scoffing inwardly.

The thought irritated him.

Still, a tad bit of relief grew over him as be turned his eyes away from her.

’Hearing her screams was worth it...but it’s not enough... I need to hear her painful scream while I stuff her with my cock....oh well, my skill still need some cooldown, so I suppose my work here is done... but my today is just getting started’

The smile widened.

However, Maria remained, gazing at Denzel with slight awe as her thoughts did not remain so gullible.

"He wasn’t here till I showed up...did he and her....?"
